# ILMessageFilterError.Code.networkRequestFailed

**Case**

The network request failed.

## Declaration

```swift
case networkRequestFailed
```

## Discussion

The network request failed (the `NSUnderlyingErrorKey` in the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSError/userInfo] dictionary of the [doc://com.apple.identitylookup/documentation/IdentityLookup/ILMessageFilterError-swift.struct] may have additional details).

## Error Codes

- **ILMessageFilterError.Code.system**: An unspecified system error occurred.
- **ILMessageFilterError.Code.invalidNetworkURL**: The network request URL given by the `ILMessageFilterExtensionNetworkURL` key in the app extension‚Äôs `Info.plist` file is either missing or invalid.
- **ILMessageFilterError.Code.networkURLUnauthorized**: The app extension‚Äôs containing app isn‚Äôt authorized to allow the app extension to defer network requests to the host specified in its `Info.plist` file.
- **ILMessageFilterError.Code.redundantNetworkDeferral**: The app extension tried to defer a request to its network service more than once, which isn‚Äôt allowed.
